MAP.COMMENT: Faltten the business data and fetch the delimiter value
Extract the values of each field of event data
Get the package name from service name

INVOKE.COMMENT: Call the core log service for logging event data

MAP.COMMENT: Convert the pipeline document to JSON string
Add event date time, external id and internal id at the start of the pipeline JSON Stirng

INVOKE.COMMENT: Call the core log service for logging event data
